description: Historic first Americas Region World Championship Qualifier. Five countries compete: USA, Canada, Jamaica, Brazil, and Argentina. Determines Americas region qualification spots for the 2027 World Championships in Leamington Spa, England. Silver tier World Bowls Series sanctioned ranking event.
